perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens inside a traditional temple where a group of four people (two men and two women) are holding incense sticks and performing a bowing prayer ritual. (2) The scene transitions to an outdoor parking lot where two women wearing masks wave and make heart gestures with their hands, soon joined by a man and another woman. (3) Close-up shots show hands organizing food offerings and several printed sheets of paper (likely name lists) on a red table within the temple. (4) A title card appears with red text on a white crumpled paper background. (5) A man with glasses and a mask talks directly to the camera in a parking lot, followed by various members of the group laughing and gesturing excitedly while looking back at the temple or the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice is heard chanting a prayer in Mandarin with a sincere tone; ambient temple sounds and low-volume background music are present. (2) Upbeat, energetic pop music begins as multiple voices cheer and shout 'Yeah!' outdoors. (3) The audio shifts back to the temple environment with the sounds of paper being handled and people discussing the placement of the name lists. (4) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies the title card transition. (5) A fast-paced conversation follows with various speakers (male and female) talking excitedly, laughing, and reacting loudly over a continuous upbeat background track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translating the prayer to the 'Land God' (土地公). (2) Decorative Text: 'Grandpa ❤️ bless us' and 'Please help us in 2025'. (3) Descriptive Text: '(Guidance from a worship veteran)' appearing as a variety-show style note. (4) Transition Text: 'Time fast-forwards to after the year-end party' in red font. (5) Hook Text: 'Sasa's small discovery' and 'Defeating Tsai Wei-chia with magic' at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a before-and-after structure: Intro -> Temple Ritual/Offerings -> Post-event reaction and discussion.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 4 main group members (2M, 2F) and one additional person briefly seen in temple background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A group of young adults dressed in casual winter/autumn clothing (hoodies, jackets, plaid shirts), most wearing face masks.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A traditional Chinese temple interior with red pillars, lanterns, and altars; an outdoor paved parking lot with cars and a building in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors and warm indoor temple lighting.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cuts with occasional sound effects.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video documents a team ritual of visiting a Land God temple to pray for business success and favorable outcomes for their upcoming company lottery/party. It serves as cultural lifestyle content that mixes traditional superstition with a lighthearted, comedic group dynamic, showing the 'results' of their prayer in a variety-show vlog format.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of variety-show style text bubbles and group-centric storytelling typical of Taiwanese vlogs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video highlights the intersection of modern workplace culture and traditional religious practices in Taiwan, specifically the 'Tu Di Gong' worship for prosperity.
